summary: Iteration G - LifeOS Priority 6 (Plan Upload Goal Target Auto-Update) + Household Notifications testing. Fixed 1 backend bug: global_search used wrong MongoDB collections. All 16 backend tests pass (100%). All frontend features verified via Playwright.

critical.issue: FIXED: global_search function used db.health_labs and db.health_appointments (non-existent collections). Actual collections are db.lab_results and db.appointments. Search for labs and appointments always returned 0 results. Fixed by changing collection names on lines 1895 and 1902 of server.py.

integration_issues.issue: Test requirement states FamilyOverview is at '/family' but the React router maps FamilyOverview to '/household' (Household nav). The '/family' route maps to a different Family management component (member list with delete icons). The household-notifications section IS working correctly at /household. This is a route naming discrepancy in the test specification - not a code bug.

action_items: DONE: Fixed global_search in server.py - changed db.health_labs to db.lab_results and db.health_appointments to db.appointments. Search for 'cholesterol' now returns 1 lab result.
INFO: FamilyOverview component is at /household route (not /family). household-notifications section is working correctly at /household showing Anupam's Cholesterol 220 mg/dL alert.
If main agent intended FamilyOverview at /family, update App.js route mapping. Currently: path='family' -> <Family/> and path='household' -> <FamilyOverview/>
critical_code_review_comments: server.py global_search (lines 1895-1906): Used incorrect MongoDB collection names db.health_labs and db.health_appointments. Actual data is in db.lab_results and db.appointments. This caused search to never return lab or appointment results. FIXED.

App.js routes: family -> Family component (member management), household -> FamilyOverview (with HouseholdNotifications). Test requirement says household-notifications should be at '/family' but the actual FamilyOverview is at '/household'. Verify intent with main agent.
DiffConfirmView plan_updates logic: When Emergency Fund checkbox is toggled off, button shows 'Apply N records + 1 goal update' (only remaining approved goal). This correctly counts approved goals.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (global_search - replaced db.health_labs with db.lab_results and db.health_appointments with db.appointments)

success_rate.backend: 100% (16/16 tests pass, after fixing search collection names)

features_tested.alerts_health_category: PASS - /api/alerts returns 1 health alert: Anupam's Cholesterol 220.0 mg/dL (high), type=lab_out_of_range, category=health, severity=error
features_tested.inbox_apply_approved_goals: PASS - approved_goal_names=['Emergency Fund'] updates Emergency Fund target correctly
features_tested.inbox_apply_empty_approved: PASS - approved_goal_names=[] does NOT update any goals
features_tested.emergency_fund_target_500000: PASS - Emergency Fund goal has target_amount=500000.0
features_tested.search_cholesterol: PASS (after fix) - /api/search?q=cholesterol returns 1 lab result: {type: 'lab', label: 'Cholesterol', sub: '220.0 mg/dL · 2026-06-25'}
features_tested.household_notifications: PASS - data-testid=household-notifications found on /household page showing 'Anupam Das's Cholesterol is 220.0 mg/dL (high)'
features_tested.household_alert_item: PASS - data-testid=household-alert-0 visible with correct content
features_tested.universal_inbox_modal: PASS - data-testid=universal-inbox-modal opens on header button click
features_tested.diff_confirm_plan_updates_section: PASS - data-testid=plan-updates-section visible when file with goals uploaded
features_tested.diff_apply_button_goal_text: PASS - Shows 'Apply 4 records + 1 goal update' correctly
features_tested.health_page: PASS - data-testid=health-page with all 4 stat cards: health-stat-vitals (0 types), health-stat-labs (5 / 14 readings), health-stat-appts (0), health-stat-flagged (2)
features_tested.finance_budget_tab: PASS - data-testid=budget-view with native month picker (input[type='month'])
features_tested.dark_mode_toggle: PASS - data-testid=dark-mode-toggle adds/removes 'dark' class on html element, localStorage flos_dark set

seed_data_creation: Uploaded test_plan_file.txt via dry_run mode to test DiffConfirmView - records NOT applied (user clicked Skip). Emergency Fund target remains at 500000.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration G tested Priority 6 (plan uploads + goal target auto-update) and Household Notifications. Backend 16/16 passing. Frontend all features verified. Fixed: global_search used wrong collection names (health_labs/health_appointments). Note: FamilyOverview (HouseholdNotifications) is at /household route, not /family. The /family route has a different Family management component. If any future test targets household-notifications, navigate to /household. DiffConfirmView plan_updates works end-to-end: upload file → dry_run → plan_updates shown with checkboxes → apply button shows correct count.

search_wrong_collections.root_cause: global_search function (server.py lines 1895-1906) queried db.health_labs and db.health_appointments which don't exist in MongoDB. The actual data is in db.lab_results (used throughout the app) and db.appointments. These collection names were introduced incorrectly when implementing global search.
search_wrong_collections.fix_applied: Changed db.health_labs to db.lab_results on line 1895 and db.health_appointments to db.appointments on line 1902
